falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 3%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a shift from the current unknown phase to a potential uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike would signal extreme market participation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential blowoff top or bottom reversal within 14 days.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks below the 2024 August bottom support level (e.g., 4,200) with a confirmed close
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a bearish continuation rather than a potential reversal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
